reviews.review_msg: This class is so relevant and helpful for everyday life. Maureen is such a sweet lady who is funny and easy to listen to. There's homework every week but it's super light and takes less than an hour. Her tests are fair and not too difficult.

Great prof, explains everything well and gives ton of practice questions that help with the exams. She provides lectures slides and goes over them in lecture and are quite straight forward.  Also, sets up additional review sessions before final. And will weigh the final more if you do better on it than you did on the midterm!

Maureen's very kind and will answer your questions thoroughly if you go to her office hour. Midterm was relevant to textbook questions but final was much more difficult. Her 8-hour review sessions weren't helpful as the exam was nothing like the questions she covered. I would recommend her class but you definitely have to work hard.

Her slides are very vague so if you skip class, you'll really struggle with the way she teaches and how she will test you on it. She doesn't really follow the textbook and her exams are hard, but as long as you study, you should be fine. She replies emails fast & if you go to office hours, she will be there to help. She's a sweet and caring prof.

The course itself is difficult. Prof. is very nice and helpful. attending all classes and taking notes are important. Her method is different from text. Do all assignments and practice exam, you will be fine. Go to her office hours when you have questions. She is very patient and cares a lot about her students. One of the greatest prof. I have had.

Her methods are very different from the ones in the textbook. So textbooks are only for homework. You wouldn't have many materials to read and study at home, only her notes, which is too little. Tests are hard.

She is really helpful, and she usually replies to emails within a day or two. She is a really helpful prof. Sure she's a hard marker, but she gives the marks where they are  deserved. Even if you go to her after with your exam after, she'll go over the exam and explain what steps you went wrong in.

Very strict and extremely hard marker. Very sweet lady though. Always willing to help her students even though her exams are difficult. She makes concepts relatively easy to understands but her exams are tricky.

Slides contain basic concepts but some parts are too unclear and simplified, esp for midterm and final. Like learning abc or 123 and expecting complete literacy. Repeating points in the end won't help for hyper rush lectures. I understand Prof and TA want us to learn, but they are condescending and adds little encouragement. Not recommended at all!
The most unhelpful professor I have ever had. Avoid taking course with her.
